title: astragalus psilacanthus subsp. psilacanthus
intro: Astragalus psilacanthus subsp. psilacanthus is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus psilacanthus subsp. psilacanthus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the immune system. Astragalus psilacanthus subsp. psilacanthus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
